reviews.comment:
Excelente atención!  Nos atendieron de 10, y nos dieron Un teléfono de un mecánico que nos soluciono él problema pudiendo llegar a Bariloche sin inconvenientes!!!  Además no nos cobro mucho!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! They treated us wonderfully and gave us the phone number of a mechanic who fixed the problem, allowing us to get to Bariloche without any further issues! Plus, he didn't charge us much!
